title: Hemidiodia ocymifolia

The plant is classified as a monocot, indicating that its seeds are produced in a single cotyledon. Hemidiodia ocymifolia is native to tropical regions, specifically in Southeast Asia. The classification of Hemidiodia ocymifolia is further supported by its characteristics, such as its leaf structure and growth habit.
